title: Canonical knowledge entry frontmatter
description: Composite frontmatter shape for one entry under <paths.wiki>/knowledge/<domain>/<slug>.md. Covers the wiki-required fields (id, type, depth_role, focus, covers, parents) plus the indexing fields (kind, entities, related, first_seen, last_verified, source, status). Per the issue spec, every write into the knowledge store goes through the atomic 4-step sequence in scripts/lib/knowledge/write.mjs; this schema is the gate.

id.description: Stable id; must equal the filename basename without extension. Lowercase kebab-case.

type.description: wiki node type. leaf = atomic entry (default for knowledge), cluster/domain = aggregating index nodes.

depth_role.description: Position in the wiki depth hierarchy. Almost always 'leaf' for knowledge entries.

focus.description: One-line topical focus that the parent wiki index will consume to route descents.

covers.description: Topical handles this entry covers; at least one. Free-form tags.

parents.description: Soft-DAG parent ids; empty array for top-level entries. The wiki layer enforces resolvability at validate time.

shared_covers.description: Optional: handles propagated up the parent chain by skill-llm-wiki's index-rebuild. Authors usually leave this empty.

kind.description: Indexing kind; agent consumers (knowledge-capture, query-by-kind) filter on this.

entities.description: Concrete entities the entry is about (file paths, service names, package names). Optional.

related.description: Other entry ids this one relates to. Soft links; not enforced as a DAG.

first_seen.description: ISO 8601 date the underlying fact was first observed (YYYY-MM-DD).

last_verified.description: ISO 8601 date a human last reconfirmed this entry. Aggressive entries may have lower latency; default to first_seen at creation.

source.description: Provenance pointer: PR ref, incident report, runbook URL, doc path. Free-form.

status.description: active = current best understanding; deprecated = replaced by a newer entry (record the replacement in `related`); archived = preserved for history, not part of routing.
